notes: Solid, complete Breakout implementation with multi-level progression, audio, hi-score persistence, pause, and proper physics; minor visual simplicity (no brick highlights/gradients) and the level-clear display shows current level number instead of next, but overall very playable and nearly bug-free.
An exceptionally well-crafted Breakout clone with flawless collision detection, smooth gameplay, excellent visual polish, and robust state management.
A solid and fully playable Breakout clone with correct core mechanics and presentation, but it is not flawless due to somewhat simplistic collision handling and a few polish-level gameplay quirks.
